title: IT158R2 CANCELLED - Employees' professional membership dues - Canada.ca
content:
## IT158R2 CANCELLED - Employees' professional membership dues

## This publication was cancelled
This publication was cancelled as of 2025-07-15 and replaced with Income Tax Folio S2-F2-C1, Employee Professional Membership and Other Dues .
While all Canada Revenue Agency web content is accessible, we also provide our forms and publications in alternate formats (digital audio, electronic text, Braille, and large print) to allow persons with disabilities to access the information they need.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
